title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
